title: Home for the Holidays Tree Lighting Street Closures
summary: The City of Syracuse will close nine street segments in downtown Clinton Square on Friday, November 24, 2023, from 4-8 p.m. for the "Home for the Holidays" Tree Lighting event. The closure affects major thoroughfares including Clinton Street, Erie Boulevard, Water Street, Salina Street, Genesee Street, and James Street in the downtown core.
department_refs: Department of Parks, Recreation and Youth Programs

political_signal.description: Community event promotion and downtown activation through holiday programming; demonstrates municipal coordination of public spaces and civic gathering.
